untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market regime detection (BULL/BEAR_MARKET context and UP/DOWN_BREAKOUT classification) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The 'New Price Lines' candlestick pattern and market context classification require custom pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set. Success rates and average performance metrics are provided as reference but cannot be directly encoded as trading conditions.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'rising candle volume' as volume > prev_volume and 'breakout' as directional price movement (close > prev_close for up, close < prev_close for down). Stop loss set to worst-case scenario (4.91% from bull market down breakout). Exit conditions modeled as reversal of entry direction per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Target regimes listed but actual market regime detection requires external classification system.
